task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened and read the 4-day workweek memo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing a text editor, file viewer, or terminal displaying the contents of '~/Desktop/4_day_workweek_memo.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent updated the weekend configuration in the HRMS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Sentrifugo HRMS Weekend Configuration page showing the updated weekend days (e.g., 3 days selected as weekends to reflect a 4-day workweek).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent updated the 'General Shift' hours to the new schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Sentrifugo HRMS Shift settings for 'General Shift' showing the Start Time updated to 08:00 and End Time updated to 18:00.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent updated the existing Annual and Sick leave entitlements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Sentrifugo HRMS Leave Entitlements or Leave Rules page showing Annual Leave updated to 16 days and Sick Leave updated to 8 days.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created the new Wellness Day leave type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Sentrifugo HRMS Leave Types or Entitlements page showing a newly created leave type (e.g., Wellness Day) with the code 'WD' and an allocation of 2 days.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Sentrifugo HRMS via the web browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Sentrifugo HRMS interface, not terminal windows executing SQL queries or API curl commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the changes were actually applied and saved in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show saved configuration screens, success toast messages, or updated data tables in Sentrifugo, rather than just text typed into input fields without saving.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not hallucinate the policy values without opening the memo.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of the agent opening '~/Desktop/4_day_workweek_memo.txt' prior to making the specific changes in the HRMS.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified policy values for Sentrifugo HRMS: 'General Shift' must be updated to start at 08:00 and end at 18:00. Annual Leave must be set to 16 days. Sick Leave must be set to 8 days. A new leave type must be created with the code 'WD' and an allocation of 2 days.
